title: WebFinger endpoint (/.well-known/webfinger)
description: Implement the WebFinger endpoint used by other servers to discover actors. Parses the resource=acct:username@domain query param, validates the domain matches ours, looks up the username, returns the JRD response. Return 404 if username not found or domain doesn't match.
design: Response: subject=acct:username@domain, aliases=[actor_uri, https://domain/@username], links=[profile-page html, self activity+json, ostatus subscribe template]. Content-Type: application/jrd+json.
acceptance_criteria: Fetch /.well-known/webfinger?resource=acct:writer@yourdomain returns correct JRD with subject, aliases, and links; wrong domain returns 404; unknown username returns 404; Mastodon client account search resolves correctly
